tasks.prompt: Check the A2 20-epoch training log at /mnt/data/datasets/AdoDAS/output/a2/runs/ (find the latest run starting with a2__grouped__coral__) and report: current epoch, best QWK, and whether training is still running or complete. Report in a single sentence. Do NOT take any actions — just report status.

Check the A2 anti-overfitting training log at /mnt/data/datasets/AdoDAS/output/a2/runs/ (find the latest run) and report: current epoch, best QWK, val_loss trend, and whether model is overfitting (val_loss increasing while train_loss decreasing). Report concisely. Do NOT take any actions.
